creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: acm

New revision: 466532

Log:
  - Migrate Mk/bsd.fpc.mk to Mk/Uses/fpc.mk
  - Convert all fpc-based ports to USES=fpc
